privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real T8 lead screw housing bracket model (T8_housing_bracket.FCStd, 33868 bytes) sourced from the official FreeCAD-library (github.com/FreeCAD/FreeCAD-library), Mechanical Parts/Mountings/ directory. The model is a PartDesign::Body containing engineering features (Pad, dual Holes, Pocket, PolarPattern). The task requires measuring eight geometric properties: bounding box dimensions (X/Y/Z in mm), volume (mm³), surface area (mm²), and center of mass coordinates (X/Y/Z in mm). Results must be saved in a plain text report with values rounded to 2 decimal places. Verification uses tolerance-based comparison: 5% relative tolerance for bounding box, volume, and surface area; absolute 2.0mm tolerance for center of mass. Ground truth values are computed at verification time using FreeCAD's Python API (Shape.BoundBox, Shape.Volume, Shape.Area, Shape.CenterOfMass). The model is real production data, not synthetic.
